description: list direct neighbors of a PrimeKG node, optionally filtered by relation type (read-only)
rules: read-only — never mutates the graph or any remote service
scans both edge endpoints (x_id == NODE_ID and y_id == NODE_ID) and returns the opposite node each time
node ids are matched as strings, so numeric gene ids work without coercion
RELATION_TYPE narrows to one edge relation (e.g. disease_gene, drug_protein, disease_phenotype)
writes the neighbor records as JSON to record_store
usage: Set PRIMEKG_CSV (path to kg.csv) and NODE_ID (from search_nodes); optionally RELATION_TYPE. Output: get_neighbors.json.
limitation: Depth-1 neighbors only. NODE_ID must be an exact PrimeKG id (use search_nodes first). Requires pandas and a local PrimeKG kg.csv edge list.
